issues.description: Card text says 'You may trash 1 card from your hand' (any card), but DSL filters for Character type. Should be generic trash action without cardType filter.

Structure uses thenActions implying the KO is conditional on trash. Card text uses colon (:) indicating the KO effect triggers when condition is met, but should be a separate conditional action. Trash should be optional (may), making this a cost-effect pair.

Target scope 'AllOpponentCharacters' is correct, but cost filter 'maxCost:1' should be 'maxCost:1' to include cost 0 and 1. Verify if 'cost of 1 or less' means ≤1 (currently correct) or needs clarification.
